titleStmt.title: SII 40.264: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 264. (A.R. No. B. 309 of 1933.) Mādala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in the garbhagṛiha of the Śakalēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1204, Uttarāyaṇa Saṅkrānti.

Records the gift of land for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Gōṭēśvaramahādēva at Māvuṇḍala by Pōtināyaka, son of Gōbanāyaka and his cousin Dēvināyaka Padmanāyaka, who call themselves the descendants of Buddhavarman.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigata paṁccama
hāśabda mahāsāmaṁta śū
ralakṣmīkāṁtta du¨rjayakula ku
lacalamrigēṁdra satyahari
ścaṁdra mahēśvara śrīpādaṁ
paṁkajarajaṁttaṁsavalaṁṭa kulāva
taṁsa kālēśvara purarakṣapālaka bi
rudaṁka śūdrakaraṇadhara
gaṁdhi gaṁḍamā¨rttaṁḍa śā
mādi samasta
hitaṁbu na svasti
śrīmatu buddhava
¨rmmamanmaḍaina śrīmatu
dēvināyani padmanāya
ṁḍūnu viriyaṁnago
banāyuni koḍku
pōtināyuṁḍu
nu tamatallidaṁḍru
laku dha¨rmmā
¨rtthaṁbugānu koṁḍapaḍu
maṭilō naṁdamavritti
yanamāṁḍalanu śaka
varuṣaṁbulu 1204
nēṁṭi yuttarāyaṇa
saṁkrāṁtti nimityaṁbuna śrī
gōṭēśvara mahādēvarakakha
ṁḍavatti dīpaṁbunaku
peṭṭina kṣētramuna 10 dī
ni jēkoni pūjāri dīparāga
nu Advayānudīpamu
nu putrikamācaṁdrākka
Digital edition of SII 40.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
